# Sol Mate
> Stake USDC to DM, match, and meet. No-shows get slashed on Solana.

Sol Mate is a trust-based social dApp built on Solana for the EasyA × Consensus Miami Hackathon 2026. Users stake USDC to send DMs, enter rooms, and confirm meetups. No-shows are automatically slashed. AI matchmaking powered by AINative embeddings and ZeroDB.

## Key Concepts
- Stake-to-interact: every DM, room entry, and meetup requires a USDC stake on Solana
- Slashing: no-shows forfeit their stake with an escalating multiplier (0.5× per offense, 3× cap)
- AI matchmaking: BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 embeddings + ZeroDB semantic search via AINative API
- Moment NFTs: mint a commemorative NFT after a confirmed meetup (requires GPS attestation)
- Reputation system: 5-dimension on-chain trust score (reliability, safety, communication, punctuality, authenticity)
- SOL gifts: transfer SOL to other users
- Coinbase x402: HTTP-native USDC payments on Base

## API
Base URL: https://sol-mate-trust-api-production.up.railway.app
Docs: https://sol-mate-trust-api-production.up.railway.app/docs
OpenAPI: https://sol-mate-landing-production.up.railway.app/openapi.json

## Key Endpoints
- POST /api/v1/auth/wallet/connect — wallet auth (challenge → signature → JWT)
- GET  /api/v1/rooms — discover rooms
- POST /api/v1/stakes — create a stake
- POST /api/v1/matches — request a match
- POST /api/v1/messages — send a message
- POST /api/v1/attestations — submit meetup attestation
- POST /api/v1/transfers — gift SOL to another user
- POST /api/v1/nfts/mint-moment — mint a Moment NFT
- GET  /api/v1/nfts/moments — list Moment NFTs

## Open Source Packages
- solmate-stake-sdk: pip install solmate-stake-sdk
- solmate-reputation: pip install solmate-reputation
- solmate-x402: pip install solmate-x402
